title: festuca brigantina
intro: Festuca brigantina, also known as mountain fescue, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca brigantina include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Festuca brigantina often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
